gcloud.description: Official Google MCP server — runs any gcloud CLI command for GCP resource discovery, management, and billing queries. npm: @google-cloud/gcloud-mcp (v0.5.3). Source: https://github.com/googleapis/gcloud-mcp

google-developer-knowledge.description: Official Google Developer Knowledge MCP server — searches and retrieves Google developer documentation. Replace YOUR_API_KEY with a Developer Knowledge API key or configure the server locally with the Claude Code command from https://developers.google.com/knowledge/mcp.

awsknowledge.description: Official AWS Knowledge MCP Server — AWS documentation for source infrastructure understanding. Source: https://github.com/awslabs/mcp
